commands.name: clean-bin
commands.description:
Cleans the `bin` and `obj` folders adjacent to .csproj files
recursively.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing .NET projects. If
none is specified, the current directory will be used.

commands.name: count-funcs
commands.description:
Provides counts of the number of calculation functions in a
project or repository.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --summary
options.description:
Displays summary totals of all projects combined into
a grand total only. No project-level counts are
displayed.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing .NET projects. If
none is specified, the current directory will be used.

commands.name: dead-calcs
commands.description: Searches CalcEngine user projects for unused user functions

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing .NET projects. If
none is specified, the current directory will be used.

commands.name: global-funcs
commands.description:
Utility to identify global function calls in CalcEngine risk
projects

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --distinct
options.description:
Will only list distinct functions called from
risks without any detail. Useful for
identifying global functions in use. Cannot be
combined with the 'Filter' (-f) option.

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Only include function call detail for the
specified function name. The filter value must
match the function name exactly.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing C# files. If
none is specified, the current directory will
be used.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --package-file
options.description:
The path to a file containing a list of packages
with versions that should be updated. Required if
package criteria not specified.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report updates only - no .csproj will be updated.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing .NET projects.
If none is specified, the current directory will be
used.

commands.name: publish-calcs
commands.description:
Publishes all calculation assemblies recursively to a given
path.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --destination
options.description:
The destination path assemblies should be
published to. If the directory does not exist it
will be created.

options.name: --release
options.description:
Boolean value to indicate a Release build should
be published. If omitted, a Debug build will be
published.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path to a directory containing .NET
projects. If none is specified, the current
directory will be used.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.
